exempt.reason: smoke test against bare Express harness; no DB path required
outbound network boundary; test mocks global.fetch to assert no real fetch leaks — sentinel regex requires a real fetch call but the test intent IS the network boundary (SSRF defence); no DB needed

C1 PR-A — pins Prom histogram emission via buildChatTestService (in-memory orchestrator + repo) and via direct ChatPhaseTimer.start/end. Driving the real OpenAI HTTP path from CI would need a live API key or full HTTP mocking — neither belongs in deterministic CI. End-to-end smoke covers the live path via pnpm smoke:api on staging.

C1 PR-A — pins LlmCacheServiceImpl.invalidateMuseum contract (R9: both museum-mode and personalized buckets purged) against a mocked CacheService. The SQL paths are exhaustively covered in tests/unit/chat/llm-cache.service.test.ts; this file is the cross-module admin↔chat contract pin and does not need a real Postgres+Redis testcontainer.

C3 T6.2 — bare Express smoke test asserting the HTTP wire contract of POST /chat/compare. Mocks the use-case via spy and exercises status mapping (200/400/401/503). Real DB + pgvector paths covered by sibling artwork-embedding-repository.test.ts and recall.test.ts.

C4 T6.1 — exercises ChatService.postMessage() with in-memory repo from buildChatTestService + a mocked ChatOrchestrator returning synthetic metadata.sources[]. Pins (1) verbatim source propagation, (2) sources-validator rejection of hallucinated quotes (R4), (3) graceful undefined when LLM omits sources, (4) Spotlighting envelope nonce. Real LLM HTTP path would require live OpenAI key — deterministic CI uses orchestrator stub. Persistence covered by chat-repository-typeorm.integration.test.ts.

C4 T6.2 — full chat pipeline (PrepareMessagePipeline + ChatMessageService glue) with KnowledgeRouterPort stub + orchestrator stub injected via buildChatTestService. Pins router facts/source propagation into OrchestratorInput and fail-open semantics when a router leg throws (R10). Pure use-case orchestration — no SQL/Redis. Wikidata/Brave/Tavily HTTP graph isolated by stub injection.

C4 T7.1 — asserts KnowledgeRouterService.resolve() opens chat.knowledge.lookup Langfuse trace with the contractual attribute set (source, fallback_triggered, judge_confidence, search_term_hash, latency_ms.*). Mocks getLangfuse() to inject a recording fake — avoids standing up the real Langfuse SDK. NFR7 PII safety asserted via hash-only payload check.

C4 T7.2 — asserts UrlHeadProbe.probeBatch() opens chat.citations.head_probe Langfuse trace with url_count / cache_hit_rate / unreachable_count metadata. Empty-input fast path emits no trace. Same module-mock pattern as knowledge-spans.test.ts — Langfuse SDK injected via jest.mock.

C4 T7.3 — verifies the four C4 Prometheus counters (chat_sources_emitted_total, chat_sources_rejected_total, chat_websearch_fallback_total, chat_url_head_probe_total) are present on /metrics with the expected label cardinality. Exercises the public renderMetrics() surface — same code-path Express /metrics route uses. Use-case unit tests mock prom-client out; this file is the cross-module registry surface pin.

C5 Step 5.2 — drives the real opossum breaker + real WikidataClient (with mocked global.fetch) + cascade { breakerState, dumpRepo } via WikidataBreakerClient and KnowledgeBaseService. Exercises the breaker trip → soak window → local dump fallback path end-to-end. fetch is mocked because the test intent IS the breaker behaviour under controlled upstream failure modes; real Wikidata in CI would be non-deterministic. The dump repository round-trip is covered separately by wikidata-kb-dump-repository.test.ts (real Postgres testcontainer).

C9.13 V1 — multilingual rerank benchmark scaffold. Reads tests/fixtures/rerank-multilingual.json from disk, computes baseline nDCG@5 per locale, asserts scores ∈ [0,1] (sanity) + logs a markdown summary to stdout for human review. No DB, no outbound HTTP, no orchestrator — V1 only exercises the local nDCG@5 helper against the fixture (NullRerankerAdapter always throws → baseline-only path). Lives under tests/integration/ because V2 (C9.13.1) will swap in the real reranker adapter and assert +5pt nDCG@5 uplift on ≥4/6 locales — at that point the file will import the adapter wiring and satisfy the tier signature naturally; this exemption will then be removed.
